---
title: 'Handmade Bags: Lord of the Rings (Small Handbag)'
date: '2017-11-28T06:34:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Creatively Unique Arts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7562876831246796483'
blogger_filename: '/2017/11/handmade-bags-lord-of-rings-small.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Creatively Unique Arts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Bags'
---

Here is a small handbag with Lord of the Rings. It comes with a small zipper front large enough for some pens (see the over-sized pencil below), and a larger zipper top.<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144418904-f068d91beb04.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144418904-811b49382d63.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144450311-846e2a3a1efd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20171127-144450311-9351a1223717.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lord-of-the-rings-bag-small-b3facdc9b0c3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lord-of-the-rings-bag-small-bc18e4c3e499.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
